minimumOrder.label: Minimum order (MOQ)
minimumOrder.detail: The practical quantity is confirmed against construction, yarn, colour, trims and material availability before sampling or production is committed.

samplingMinimum.label: Sampling
samplingMinimum.detail: A prototype can be developed before production so fit, construction, material and finishing decisions can be reviewed and approved.

samplingTime.label: Typical sampling time
samplingTime.detail: Timing begins after the brief, available materials and sample scope are confirmed; revisions add time and are scheduled explicitly.

productionTime.label: Typical production time
productionTime.detail: The committed schedule depends on style complexity, quantity, material availability, buyer approvals and the required delivery date.

markets.label: Markets served
markets.value: Pakistan, the US, UK and Europe
markets.detail: YK Apparels works with emerging and established fashion brands, retailers, teams and event organizers in Pakistan and international markets.

internationalShipping.label: International orders
internationalShipping.detail: Destination, delivery terms, shipping responsibility and required documentation are confirmed for each order before production is committed.
